title: V0: id + version
items: Wire createVersioning(0, ...) into node() when opts.versioning provided
advanceVersion() call on every DATA emission (value changed)
describeNode() includes { id, version } when V0 active
graph.snapshot() includes per-node { id, version } — enables delta restore
Graph.diff() uses version counters to skip unchanged nodes — O(changes)

title: V0 backfill (post-implementation)
items: Phase 1.4b: V0 version counters for true delta checkpoints
Phase 3.2: data structure entries carry V0 identity
Phase 3.2b: verifiable/distill carry V0 for tracking
Phase 3.3: Graph.diff() upgrade to version-gated O(changes) diffing
Phase 4.2: topic messages, subscription cursors, jobQueue jobs carry V0
Phase 4.3: collection/lightCollection entries carry V0; knowledgeGraph entity/relation identity
Phase 4.4: agentMemory entries carry V0; chatStream message identity
Phase 4.5: events carry V0 (replay dedup); projections track version; commands carry version for optimistic concurrency
Phase 5.3: workerBridge wire sync uses version counters
Phase 5.4: gaugesAsContext sends only changed nodes; knobsAsTools includes version

title: V1: + cid + prev (content addressing, linked history)
items: V1: + cid + prev (content addressing, linked history)
